message:
fix: audit batch 220 — 4 files fixed across 16 audited (14500L)

- web/response.rs: HIGH CRLF injection in Redirect location header
- web/sse.rs: MEDIUM CRLF injection in event/id fields, LOW u128→u64 truncation
- decoding.rs: MEDIUM plan.k as u16 truncation, MEDIUM expected as u16, LOW NaN/Inf handling
- trace/certificate.rs: MEDIUM u64 as i64 wrapping in balance methods

Files audited SOUND: combinator/pipeline.rs, obligation/marking.rs,
service/load_balance.rs, web/handler.rs, web/compress.rs, web/security.rs,
trace/event_structure.rs, trace/scoring.rs, trace/buffer.rs,
database/sqlite.rs, trace/recorder.rs, trace/causality.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
